key.name: enable-blur
key.description: Whether to blur the lock screen background.

key.name: blur-radius
key.description: The radius of the lock screen background blur.

key.name: blur-brightness
key.description: The brightness of the lock screen background (0.0 is black, 1.0 is full brightness).

key.name: clock-visible
key.description: Toggle the visibility of the lockscreen clock.

key.name: clock-font-size
key.description: Font size of the lockscreen clock in pixels.

key.name: clock-font-family
key.description: Font family name of the lockscreen clock.

key.name: clock-color
key.description: Hex color of the lockscreen clock (e.g. #ffffff).

key.name: date-visible
key.description: Toggle the visibility of the lockscreen date.

key.name: date-font-size
key.description: Font size of the lockscreen date in pixels.

key.name: date-font-family
key.description: Font family name of the lockscreen date.

key.name: date-color
key.description: Hex color of the lockscreen date.

key.name: custom-text-enabled
key.description: Toggle visibility of a custom screen message.

key.name: custom-text
key.description: The message to display on the lock screen.

key.name: custom-text-font-size
key.description: Font size of the custom message.

key.name: custom-text-font-family
key.description: Font family of the custom message.

key.name: custom-text-color
key.description: Hex color of the custom message.
